entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!

entry.title: Re: SAP DM - How to create routing(or operation activity)...

entry.title: Re: SBPA Integration with Flexible Workflow in Public Cloud

entry.title: Re: SBPA Integration with Flexible Workflow in Public Cloud

entry.title: Re: How to Retrigger Output Parameter Determination Autom...
entry.content:
Hello,

Normally if the OPD criteria is not met, output item is stay with "in preparation" status. You can then update sales order to make sure sales order data match to OPD setting. The output item can either be processed manually or triggered automatically when saving the sales order. 

If you want to re-trigger the order confirmation output items in sales order, you can use following SSCUIs to enable order confirmation change:

  • 101214: Assign Output Types for Changed Documents
  • 101873: Define Output Texts
  • 101874: Assign Output Texts to Document Data

Best regards,

Yong

entry.title: Re: Changing useful life of an asset class
entry.content:
Hello @sumesh_gupta,

Many thanks for your reply.

I have checked the transaction code and i understand the process for asset classes.

Could you please kindly let me know if there another change need to done in system after i changed the useful life of the asset class ?

 

Thank you,

entry.title: QS21 classifications
entry.content: Hi! Please help, has anyone worked with classifications in QS21? Explain how they work, how they will be displayed in the results, how to configure them? Preferably with screenshots

entry.title: Re: KBA 3370268 (program variant save bug) is unclear
entry.content: @amontella96 Thank you. It's only a KBA, it doesn't contain a fix. This KBA describes a bug and says that the solution is to apply the fix from another SAP note.

entry.title: Re: [Error] BDC clearing partial vendor field not input
entry.content: Search the Web: how to see the ABAP Call Stack via the ABAP debugger

entry.title: Re: Difference between saint and spam
entry.content:
SPAM :

It is used to upgrade the Support pack level of the existing component.

Eg : ST-PI - 740 - 26 --> ST-PI - 740 - 28

Here - ST-PI : Component, 740 - Release, 26 - SP level

SAINT :

Whereas SAINT is used to upgrade the release version of the existing component.

Eg : ST-A/PI - 01V_731 - 003 --> ST-A/PI_01W_731 - 001.

Here - ST-A/PI : Component, 01V_731 & 01W_731 - Release, 003 & 001 are the SP Level.

And also, we use SAINT to install new component and add on to our machine.

 

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: can we transmit value contract copy to vendor from massege output?
entry.content: can you give any suggestion for the same?

entry.title: Re: Enriching Readings from MQTT Sensors with the Applicable Manufacturing Context
entry.content:
Hi Frank,

we are also trying to connect to MQTT broker in our DM system. The only problem that we are facing is that our MQTT broker is having  user authentication by using username and password. so when we are trying to connect MQTT broker using production connector we are unable to connect as it gives below error:

"Unable to connect to the broker.Connecting with MQTT server failed (BadUserNameOrPassword)."

Now Question is, we are unable to find where to maintain this username and password in the SAP DM or something we are doing wrong. Can you please help.

Quick response will be appriciated.

Regards,
Ankit Gupta

entry.title: Introduction - Irtaza Zaidi
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community!

My name is Irtaza Zaidi, and I recently graduated with a BS in Operations and Supply Chain Management from UMT in 2024. As I embark on my professional journey, I'm excited to explore the world of SAP, particularly the Quality Management (QM) module. I believe SAP's capabilities in improving processes and enhancing decision-making align perfectly with my interests and my educational background.

I'm eager to learn from the community and share my experiences as I deepen my understanding of SAP and its applications in the operations and supply chain management fields. Looking forward to engaging with fellow professionals and SAP enthusiasts!

Best regards,
Irtaza Zaidi

entry.title: Maintain username and password for 3rd party MQTT broker SAP DM
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are trying to configure 3rd party MQTT broker in our system. All the configuration are in place and agent are deployed in the production connector. while trying to run the agent in the logs we are getting error like below:

"Unable to connect to the broker. Connecting with MQTT server failed (BadUserNameOrPassword)."

Please note that MQTT server is having user based authentication also but in DM we are unable to figure out where we can maintain the credentials.
can anyone please help us resolving this issue or pointing to the correct direction if something is wrong.

Quick response will be appriciated.

Regards,
Ankit Gupta

entry.title: Re: The next step of ABAPs evolution: ABAP Cloud now part of SAP Build
entry.content:
Thanks for sharing @lienards

ABAP has evolved significantly with the introduction of SAP Build, which integrates ABAP Cloud into a comprehensive development platform. This integration allows developers to utilize low-code, pro-code, and #generativeAI tools within a single environment, streamlining the application development process. By providing a unified entry point through the SAP Build Lobby, developers can easily manage their ABAP projects alongside other programming languages, enhancing collaboration and efficiency. This evolution not only modernizes ERP systems but also empowers developers to innovate and automate processes more effectively within the SAP ecosystem.

entry.title: Re: The holy trinity of Integration
entry.content: Thanks for the blog ! Excellent overview of the architecture.

entry.title: Table for stocks from storage types with level of available quantity 1
entry.content: In EWM, We have a scenario where the HU's which are in storage types with the level of available quantity as "1" [Bin level] - not visible in AQUA / QUAN table.

entry.title: Re: 物料凭证过账，如何自动勾选 打印输出控制
entry.content: You can also set default print option in following fiori apps: Post Goods Receipt for Purchasing Document, Post Goods Receipt for Inbound Delivery, Post Goods Receipt for Production Order. Please refer to KBA 3329637 for detailed information

entry.title: Self Introduction in SAP S/4HANA PP
entry.content:
Hey SAP Community!

My name is Syed Irtaza Hussain Zaidi, and I recently graduated with a BS in Operations and Supply Chain Management from UMT in 2024. As I embark on my professional journey, I'm excited to explore the world of SAP, particularly the Production Planning (PP) module. I believe SAP's capabilities in improving processes and enhancing decision-making align perfectly with my interests and my educational background.

I'm eager to learn from the community and share my experiences as I deepen my understanding of SAP and its applications in the operations and supply chain management fields. Looking forward to engaging with fellow professionals and SAP enthusiasts!

Best regards,
Syed Irtaza Hussain Zaidi

entry.title: Re: 物料凭证过账，如何自动勾选 打印输出控制
entry.content: Its not possible to set the indicator by default in MIGO - however, from the app 'Output Parameter Determination' under Goods Movement / Output Type. Select the line - here you can leave the 'Print Active' flag empty (as per the screenshot I've attached from my internal system) and the output will be sent automatically without the user needing to set the print indicator in Post Goods Movement (MIGO).

entry.title: Re: How to call SAP ByDesign API from S4HANA Cloud System
entry.content: Hi did you check here ? https://api.sap.com/products/SAPBusinessByDesign/apis/packages

entry.title: Report on Work Location in Time Posting
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Is there any report where we can see the "Work Location" based timesheet reporting after successfully submitted the time posting in "Manage My Timesheet" app.

Thanks & Regards,

Rao.

entry.title: Re: message no M7042. Batch does not exist?
entry.content:
Thank you for your answer.
Propably I didn't discribed issue enough.

I know that I can cancel an inspection lot, but the inspection lot is still visible in the transaction QA32 after canceling.
From the other side I cannot delete the batch for inspection lot in the transaction QA02 and I cannot set usage decision.

My goal is that the list in the transaction QA32 is clean. 

Thank you for understanding and support

Br:

david

entry.title: Re: Moving from SAP Insights to Navigator
entry.content:
SAP Signavio Process Insights only has the links to SAP Signavio Process Explorer (which you see in the Collaboration Hub). A direct jump to SAP Signavio Process Navigator isn't supported.

Kind Regards

Volker

entry.title: Is it possible to customize the table subtitle?
entry.content:
Hi colleagues,

Is it possible to customize the table subtitle in SAC stories? We've configured the number scale in the table so the subtitle is showed as "in k" but we'd like to change it to "in k tCO2e" or other terminologies which could be more clear to our users. I've attached a screenshot for your reference.

Thanks and best regards

Cham

entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are getting the below error while assigning the customer project (J11) billing WBS element to a sales order item. This error is not understandable and hence please explain, what is this error and why we are getting when assigning the billing WBS element?

Error" Requested function ENT1 is not available here"

 

Thanks & Regards,

Rao.

entry.title: Re: Regarding the "The service metadata is invalid" error...
entry.content:
This is such a strange issue, and I hope it gets resolved soon.

If there is a database setting defined in a higher-level (high-priority) configuration file, try deleting it, leaving only the sqlite section in package.json. Then, restart VS Code and try again.

In my case, I had provided the DB connection info in .cdsrc-private.json, and it stopped working, so I deleted it and tried again, which made it work.

This is truly odd. I really hope it gets fixed soon.

ref @JulianZankl 

 

@cap-js/asyncapi: 1.0.2
@cap-js/db-service: 1.14.1
@cap-js/openapi: 1.0.5
@sap/cds: 8.4.1
@sap/cds-compiler: 5.4.2
@sap/cds-dk: 8.1.2
@sap/cds-dk (global): 8.3.0
@sap/cds-fiori: 1.2.7
@sap/cds-foss: 5.0.1
@sap/cds-mtxs: 2.0.5
@sap/eslint-plugin-cds: 3.0.4
Node.js: v20.15.0
CAP Java SDK: 3.2.0
cds4j: 3.2.0
Spring Boot: 3.3.3
Maven: 3.9.9
Java: 21.0.3(Eclipse Adoptium) for windows, 21.0.5(sapjvm) for mac
OS: Windows 11, 10.0, arch: amd64
Max OS X, 15.0.1, arch: aarch64

 

SAP Cloud Application Programming Model 

SAP Fiori Elements

entry.title: Re: Need to pre allocate stock for a customer in S4Hana p...
entry.content: Additional information can also be found in the SAP Community where dedicated blogs for the topic exist. A good entry point is the blog from @Arno-Meyer Increasing Reliability with Supply Protection

entry.title: Issue where standard CDS View cannot be imported in Datasphere
entry.content:
Thank you for viewing.

As part of my investigation into Datasphere's hierarchy function, I am currently trying to reproduce the steps in the blog below on my actual device, but I am experiencing an issue where the CDS View related to G/L account information starting with "I_GLACCOUNT" in the blog is not displayed on Datasphere's remote table import screen. (Figure 1)

SAP Datasphere: Introducing the Directory Hierarchy - SAP Community 

 (図１)

 

By referring to the blog below, we have investigated the settings required for the target CDS View and confirmed that the following two conditions are met.
How to use CDS views that can extract data - SAP Community 
・The annotation "@Analytics.dataExtraction.enabled" is set to "true"
・"ISSAPRELEASEDVIEW" in I_DATAEXTRACTIONENABLEDVIEW is set to X (⇒It is a released CDS view that can extract data)

However, one thing that struck me while researching the above was that the CDS View starting with "I_GR" shown in the image in (Figure 1) was displayed on Datasphere even though "ISSAPRELEASEDVIEW" was not set to X. (The annotation "@Analytics.dataExtraction.enabled" was set to "true".)

 

I suspect that there is some setting that I've overlooked. if anyone knows how to solve this issue, I would appreciate your help.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: How to use Smart Filter Bar with controlConfiguration conditionType as “DateRangeType”?
entry.content:
"PlannedGIDate_Range2": {
	"conditionTypeInfo": {
		"name": "sap.ui.comp.config.condition.DateRangeType",
		"data": {
			"operation": "DATERANGE",
			"value1": new Date(new Date().setDate(new Date().getDate() - 6)),
			"value2": new Date(new Date().setDate(new Date().getDate() - 1)),
			"key": "PlannedGIDate_Range2",
			"calendarType": "Gregorian"
		}
	}
}

@cvasaba1 You have to use Javascript Date objects

entry.title: Re: Professional Service for billing the product P003 is...
entry.content:
Hi @MJ57,

the standard material P003 is designed for the periodical billing and not the usage based billing. For usage based billing you should use the standard material P002, as the system also automatically allocated. To be able then to invoice you have to allocate the 500 units to the work package assigned to the billing item.

Best regards,

David

entry.title: Re: How to Retrigger Output Parameter Determination Autom...
entry.content:
Hi Yong,

Are these SSCUIs also relevant for On-Premise systems?

entry.title: Re: Best practices using SAP_ALL for implementations
entry.content:
@step158 I'm positive you can do all those settings without SAP_ALL but with proper basis authorizations. I'm not authorization expert so I can't advise exact roles/profiles. However, I've seen EWM deployments done without SAP_ALL.

Mature and security aware organizations use firefighter id concept to temporarily grant elevated privileges in production environments.

After clicking the Display Help and Followed the procedure as per the Display Help, But still the same Error is persisted.

Anyone can Help me with this.

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Internal Number range skip in vendor master upload using Migration cockpit
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

We are using Migration cockpit for uploading vendor master in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition.  We have vendor number range and BP number range set as Internal.

While uploading, vendor number range is skipped and please refer below screenshot.  In customizing, we have set as no buffering.

Could you please advise on the SAP Standard behavior on the Internal number range skip in vendor master although in customizing it is maintained as No buffering.

Could you please advise on this. 

Thank you,

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

Thank you

SAP HANA, express edition Basis Technology

entry.title: Re: Automatic Start of Production Process
entry.content: If you register the process to the service registry, it will be available as an API and you can call it in principle from anywhere. You can check the endpoint in Manage Service Registry.

entry.title: Re: Missing privileges to publish the changes on Budget version
entry.content: @Vasu_Sac 1. Read access to DA folder. Manage (Edit) access to folder having models.... 2. If model data privacy is switched on, Version by default becomes secure. if not activated, then fine....... 3. try giving once through task role. ............. Also Vasu, even if it is folder access issue, role task missing, or Version issue, The error will always be same. Missing privileges to publish the changes on version

My current approach is a bit complex as I have to send SAP DMS folder link separately to each contact registered in SAP Marketing Cloud.

entry.title: Re: Uploading Document in SAP Marketing Cloud forms
entry.content:
Hi @ElyasD,

Based on my implementation experience, it's not possible to add/upload a document in the Forms, instead, you can add a URL in the form itself (e.g. GoogleDrive, Blob, etc)

I hope this answers your query.

Thanks and Regards,
Kunal Bansal
SAP CX Solution Architect
……………………………………………………….

entry.title: Re: How to Retrigger Output Parameter Determination Autom...
entry.content: Hello, No. You can access to IMG directly in On-Premise. The SSCUI is only available in S/4 public cloud.

Thank you for replying. 
I guess that is the only approach available as I have been searching for best solution for a while.

entry.title: Re: I cannot find the "Post Post-Capitalization" application
entry.content:
Hello Ran111,

You may try this app: post asset acquisition -and quantity adjustment.  https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F6488')/S32

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM custom dashboards, and restricting filter values available based on assigned roles
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have successfully configured the Integration & Exception monitoring in SAP Cloud ALM. Now we are able to view data for our systems (e.g. all the Iflows) in SAP Cloud ALM.

However, we have a requirement from Business team for creating a new Dashboard.

In the new dashboard, a User should view only restricted packages based on their assigned Business stream. The user should not be able to see packages in Integration & Exception Monitoring associated with other Business streams.

How do we create a new Dashboard in SAP Cloud ALM? How do we use roles to restrict the visibility of specific values in the data filters (e.g. show only specific package values to each user) as per the Business Team's requirement? We have explored many custom role options already, but we are unable to proceed further.

 

Thanks in advance!!
Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM custom dashboards, and restricting filt...
entry.content:
Currently SAP Cloud ALM cannot help you meet your business requirement.

  • SAP Cloud ALM currently does not offer functionality to create Custom dashboards.
  • The available apps are pre-built and cannot be customized deeply. They rely on the pre-built Role Collections, which do not provide the level of restrictions that you require. 

However, there is an alternative option.

SAP Cloud ALM offers APIs so that Customers can extract data from their tenant and consume it using other software. For example, SAP Analytics Cloud can consume SAP Cloud ALM data via the SAP Cloud ALM API for Analytics. Users can build Custom dashboards there, and grant specific users the access to those dashboards. A dashboard can be created for each Business Stream. Users can be given access to only the dashboards relevant to their assigned Business Streams.

The example I outlined above uses SAP Analytics Cloud. But any external Business Analytics software or Dashboard builder can be used instead (e.g. Grafana, etc.). The core principles are the same, regardless of the external software used.

  1. Configure your external software to send requests to the SAP Cloud ALM APIs (specifically the Analytics API) to pull data from your SAP Cloud ALM tenant.
  2. Configure dashboards to display the desired data, filtering it based on Business Streams.

More information about the SAP Cloud ALM APIs can be found at these pages:

  • Calling an SAP Cloud ALM API
  • Analytics API, Integration Monitoring provider
  • SAP Business Accelerator Hub for SAP Cloud ALM APIs

entry.title: Re: Uploading Document in SAP Marketing Cloud forms

entry.title: Re: How to create Business Partner (BP) and customer mast...
entry.content: Hello jmarquezmr, Thank you for your advise. We had used SAP S/4 migration cockpit, however we have the customer number range getting skipped even when we have internal number range. our specific requirement is that number range should not be allowed to skip. we tried in customizing with no buffering option however still customer number range is getting skipped. Due to this reason, we are attempting to create BP/customers utilizing BAPI. Thank you, Kind regards, Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Re: How to remove the SAP login in branded MDK app ?
entry.content:
@Sourabh1 

The SAP Universal Login or any login screen in the MDK client is based on the trust configuration in your BTP subaccount. The MDK client requires the user to authenticate in order to access the application. Authentication can be done using either basic credentials or certificate-based authentication.

What login screen do you have in the app? What does it do?

entry.title: Re: Username Change in Incoming IDOC
entry.content: Sorry for the late response . We got the root cause why this was happening . In transcation OYEA , Start without event linkage option was checked by some project team in quality server . We unchecked this option and IDOC's are routing through WF-BATCH user and getting success .

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to customize the table subtitle?

Hi Experts,

I need to add digital signature reuse component on Object page action 'onBeforeSave'. The Fiori ListReport application is based on RAP v4 oData service.
Now when I am trying to create component in object page extension, I am getting this.getOwnerComponent() undefined.

this.getOwnerComponent().createComponent({...

not sure how to resolve this issue.
I am following below document for the same.
https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/70761bba72014fb48199b9232d0d8409/fd2f4a443c704204b06cbb88d4a05f66.html

entry.title: Re: Asset transfer from (buliding asset to land asset)
entry.content:
Hello,

Please go through this post, similar topic has been discussed here.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: ADT ABAP Debugger - What to do if your program does not stop at breakpoints
entry.content:
@Jelena_Perfiljeva 
 
Hello Jelena,
 
thanks for contributing to the list! It is much appreciated.
 
Indeed the following 2 things need to be in place before the update process is started (= before the commit statement is executed):
  1. You need to have an already running debug session (for the code position before the commit statement)
  2. The update debugging setting needs to be active
    • In ADT it is necessary to activate the update-debugging-setting for every single debug session/iteration (this part of the blog describes how). In ADT, this is only possible within an already running debug session
    • In SAP GUI the setting is more sticky, so you don't have to reactivate it for each debug session
That means ADT is more cumbersome here. But at the same time it's also more failsafe, because the ADT user is forced to have a running debug session, otherwise it would be impossible to activate the update-debugging-setting in ADT.
 
For both ADT & SAP GUI: The new debug sessions that will show up after starting the update processes should always stop in the first code line of the update code. It is not necessary to have any breakpoint within the update function module.
 
However, breakpoints that are needed in a later part of the update code, e.g. in the BADI in your example, might have to be recreated within the new debug session. That is because normal SAP GUI 'session breakpoints' have a validity scope of the current logon session (thus the name session breakpoint), while the update process will run in an additional new logon session.
 
Best regards,
Armin

entry.title: 从条件记录中获取时，在销售订单中自动统计 JR1 条件
Re: Error message when I use in enable now the function “...
entry.content:
In that case you should have all the data necessary to use the SAP Cloud ALM API. Have you tried running requests against the SAP Cloud ALM API using a REST API client tool (e.g. cURL, Bruno, Postman, etc.) to see if it indicates any errors?

It sounds like the issue could be on the SAP EnableNow side. I suggest that you leave a comment on the blog you followed, the author should be able to clarify why EnableNow has that error message.

entry.title: Re: ODPI e ORDR
entry.content: Did you check at item level, AFAIK should be RDR1 and DPI1, fields baseentry and baseline.

entry.title: Re: Publice cloud是否可以直接銷售出貨專案庫存(601+Q)
entry.content: 您好；

entry.title: Re: Need Basis Expert how to enable configure button on AL11 tcode
entry.content:
Hello,

4.0B is quite old. I do not really know whether there is the possibility available to configure own AL11 entries. Did you have a look into SU56 when trying it? Possibly the function for editing is deactivated because of a missing authorization. 

Also have a look whether table USER_DIR exists in your system (in newer systems this is where own configured AL11 entries are stored, I do not know if this table exists in rel. 4.0B). Usually this table is allowed for maintenance via SE16, but this requires an opened (system settings in SCC4 and SE03) system. 

Kind regards

Jan

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA 構築手順に関する質問
entry.content:
本件回答させて頂きます。

  • Learning Hubを契約し、学習なさってください。
  • SAP Test and Demo User, starter packageであれば、ほとんどのオンプレ製品をカバーしております（検証いただけます）。
  • https://support.sap.com/en/my-support/help-support-applications/license-key-help.htmlをご参考ください。

entry.title: Re: Transporting only changed/modified/created holidays and holiday calendars from development to qu
entry.content: Very useful, exactly the advice I needed. thanks!

entry.title: Re: SAP CLOUD ALM API & Integration: Tasks/User Stories/Defects to Azure DevOps Work Item
entry.content:
Hello Xavier,

first of all, thank you very much for this insightful blog post!

Is this integration bi-directional or only outbound from SAP CALM?

In case we would want a bi-directional integration, we would have to build something on our own, correct?

Thank you very much in advance!

BR
Claudius

entry.title: Re: Problem with Geo-coodinates colums
entry.content:
Your steps are correct.
1.- Create the Location field in a Dimension.
2.- Associate the Dimension to the Fact
3.- And in the Analytical Model select the association to the Dimension to publish its fields (including the Location).

I don't understand why you see two Location fields, you should only see one inside the Dimension ‘folder’. Try deleting the one that is out of the Dimension.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: P & ID tagging in equipment master
entry.content: Hi Nakul,

entry.title: Re: Getting started - Send Events from SAP S/4HANA to SAP Event Mesh on Business Technology Platform
entry.content:
Hi @hobru 

Great blog, thanks 👍

In an on-prem multi environment architecture (S4-DEV, S4-QAS, S4-PRD) how would you setup the event mesh on SAP BTP? 

Currently we have a single BTP-Subaccount with multiple spaces. One space for each environment (dev, qas & prd) and one event mesh instance in evey space.

Now we face some issues with the naming of the name spaces. Seems like there is a restriction that a namespace can only exist one time in a subaccount? Therefore you would need to have the environment in the namespace, for example 

"namespace": "dev/az/hbr"
"namespace": "qas/az/hbr"
"namespace": "prd/az/hbr"

We did not find any hints for architecture design in the documentation and OSS Ticket is unanswered from SAP..

Therefore we are looking forward to any ideas from the community.

entry.title: Re: Moving from SAP Insights to Navigator
entry.content: Hi Volker, Thank you very much for your feedback. That means I always need the HUB for the graphical representation. Got it. Do you know if I am then always forced to use Intelligence as well? We are considering focussing on Insights and no longer using Intelligence. However, we don't want to do without the graphical representation of the process flows. Does Explorer work independently of Intelligence? Do you know that? I am still trying to understand how the individual tools are dependent on each other and how they interact.

entry.title: Re: Designing UI5 Apps as Business Solution for SAP Build Work Zone - Part 1
entry.content:
Thank you @js2. These are great questions, so here are the answers:

  • The templates in Fiori Tooling will be updated. But I can't provide any timelines for this.
  • Yes standalone approuter will be supported in this scenario as well, however it is not in focus of my blog and not released yet. In general the same patterns can be applied there but there will be an approuter module and an additional service instance needed. 
  • You create one content provider per business solution which contains a set of apps that belong together (see part 2 where multiple apps belong to one content provider). Part 3 will show how to split your project and still have it under one content provider.
  • Refreshing the content provider is no longer needed. When you redeploy the app-host the cache will be invalidated automatically. This pain point of the HTML5 content provider has been removed. With the new technology the old HTML5 content provider will become deprecated and not developed further.

entry.title: Re: Program variant has a value despite "save field without value" in ECC 6 EHP7
entry.content:
How "old" are those variants (which version) and were they created manually (by standard) or thru some FM (I didn't see such bug since 4.6c 😎)

  • No RSVARDOC_NEW so no RSVCHECK_NEW - Did you consider implementing the notes listed in 2952867 - Documentation about new tools (RSVCHECK_NEW, RSVARDOC_NEW) for report selection variants

entry.title: SAP Disclosure Management Stack 2200
entry.content:
Hi Marc,

are there any news regarding the release date for stack 2200?

Could you perhaps give us some insight into what will change and whether the update will be "absolutely necessary"? Does the client also need to be refreshed again? Questions upon questions…

Thank you very much!

Best regards, Peter

entry.title: Re: EWM warehouse task is not getting saved
entry.content: It is part of bin sorting. in transaction /scwm/sbst you can sort all bins for required activity as pick and putawary and int etc.

entry.title: Re: Linking primary sales accounts has not been completed

thank you Joseph

 

this is correct solution

There is already domestic & foreign receivable account are mapped but  i found this error 

issue resolved after mapping "revenue account"

entry.title: Re: Conversion to SAP S/4HANA with Funds Management module active in SAP ECC system
entry.content: Thank you for this post, it's very useful.

entry.title: FCV In Bank Accounts is Incorrect comparing to Trial Balance
entry.content:
Hello Dears 

My COCD Currency is EGP and bank Account Currency is USD 
for Example: i have 100 USD and each Dollar for 50 EGP so it should be 5000 EGP in My trial Balance under this Account 
It appears in Trial Balance and FBL3N with credit (-2500) And its Incorrect because i have debit 100 USD 

After A month it May 1 dollar = 52 EGP so how can make System Adjust the local and Trial Balance for that account once I changed the Rate? noting that i run FAGL_FCV For Gl Balances and nothing Changed in TB

Thanks In advance

entry.title: Re: General Display Name Opt out in Second Half of 2024
entry.content:
Hi @Melli90 ,

If not any name format is configured, we will generate default general display name according to according to message key COMMON_USER_DISPLAYNAME in company default locale, by default the message key is defined as a combination of first name, middle name and last name.

Thanks

Harvey

entry.title: Packaging Material not relevant for Billing S4Hana Cloud
entry.content:
In our SAP Public Cloud setup, we manage packing in Warehouse Management (WM) and add the packaging material as a line item to the outbound delivery after goods issue, which has been possible since the 2408 release. Our goal is to have the packaging material (item category HUPM) visible on the shipping form without making it billable. However, when I create the billing document, I encounter an error stating that item category HUPM can’t be billed.

I've implemented logic as per SAP Note 3248636 to make the packaging material non-billing relevant, but the error still appears when generating the billing document. Has anyone successfully resolved this issue, or could you recommend additional steps or settings to ensure HUPM items are excluded from billing?

Any insights would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: Re: ME_INFORECORD_MAINTAIN_MULTI to create inforecord wit...
entry.content: Check 3070467 - ME_INFORECORD_MAINTAIN_MULTI: Template for creating info record for sample to fill parameters

entry.title: Re: 物料凭证过账，如何自动勾选 打印输出控制
entry.content: 已按照您提供的方式处理成功，谢谢。

entry.title: Re: Moving from SAP Insights to Navigator
entry.content: The Process Explorer is free of charge. You don't need Process Intelligence. But you can use Process Intelligence also in conjunction with Process Insights data (the so-called Plug & Gain methodology) and would be able to make use of the visualization capabilities of Process Intelligence.

entry.title: Re: Concurrent Absences in Employee Central Time Management - H2 2021
entry.content:
Hi Priyanka,

Thanks a lot for this wonderful blog!

I have a requirement that consider a employee create a new Sick leave with the undetermined enddate with 99% sick. Now after a week, he recovered a bit and he should change the percentage from 99 to maybe 50%. And similarly after another week he recovered fully and that also has to be captured in the system.

So all these changes can be captured in a Single request?

Like:
1) New leave created from Nov1st to undetermined date with 99%
2) Same request modified from 99% to 50% on Nov8th, (i.e user was 99% sick from Nov1st to 7th, and from 8th He is 50% sick with undetermined date.)
3) Same request modified from 50% to 0% on Nov15th, and similarly i.e from Nov8th to Nov15th he was 50% sick, and on Nov 16th Sick Leave should be closed as it reaches zero.

All, this changes should be captured in a single request with multiple entries in the system. Also, we have external integration to track these changes, so it will be good how we can track the request, like whenever there is a change in a request, how we can check the nature of the request whether is it New or Changed or Modified or Closed something like that.

So is this kind of process allowed in SF, like Modifying the single leave request with multiple entries? Or is there any workaround for this case?

We have these kind of Sick Leave requirement for NLD country. Looking forward for you response!

thanks,
Vignesh

entry.title: Re: Need Basis Expert how to enable configure button on AL11 tcode
entry.content: Tq Jan for reply. I have done this to tick maintain. and configure pfcg to my user id profile regenerate. still AL11 is only display button. And figure out your question USER_DIR doesn't exist.

Best regards,

Miyu Imai

entry.title: No confirmation dialog appeared after what's new 2411 update
entry.content:
According to whats new 2411 "Changes to the Business Document Approval Process",

A confirmation dialog should appear when the "Reject" button is clicked.

I tried this function on updated environment on the approval screen,

But no dialog appeared.

Should I create an incident?

entry.title: Request for Free Certification Support
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community Team,

My name is Ahmed Hany, and I am an SAP HCM Consultant. I am reaching out to seek your assistance in obtaining free certification opportunities that can help me further my career and enhance my skills.

completed my learning journey in exploring the SAP SuccessFactors platform. My Universal ID is P2008441693, and I have already obtained a free certificate, which I have attached to this email for your reference.

I appreciate any guidance or support you can provide regarding available certification options.

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: Re: QS21 classifications
entry.content:
Greetings,

classification of characteristic (MIC) is used to classify the characteristics and doesn't affect QM processes. It is used for finding characteristic (MIC) which are grouped together in a class and described by additional values - class characteristics.

Data preparation steps:

  • create characteristics in CT04
  • create class of type 005 in CL02 and assign characteristics
  • create characteristic (MIC) in QS21 and assign classification class to it. Additionally describe the characteristics with values

Finding the characteristics for usage in inspection plan:

  • create or change inspection plan using QP01 or QP02
  • find master inspection characteristic (MIC) according to class 
  • assign master inspection characteristic (MIC) to an operation

Best regards, Matjaž.

entry.title: Re: AFO SAC Edition and Standard Edition installed simult...
entry.content: Hello William and thank you for your answer. Is it possible with standard edition to upload AFO workbook in SAC??

entry.title: Outgoing Check and Payment
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

Our client’s in Turkey, operational processes include an "Outgoing Checks Process," which is actively in use. The users aim to select the check numbers they have issued to proceed with payments.

Number ranges are created for outgoing checks related bank accounts in 'Manage Checkbook' app, as in the FCHI process.

App: Manage Checkbox

For payments related to an open invoice with an outgoing check, we previously used transaction code F-58 in on-premise systems. However, we were unable to locate a similar transaction code in the public cloud system. We are now attempting to manage the check process via the 'Receive Bill of Exchange' app.

Here, we selected *outgoing payment* and posting key 39, using 'W' as the Special G/L Indicator.

In the F-58 screens, when entering a check, the next check number is automatically populated by entering the check number defined in FCHI.

However, when entering from this screen, we are unable to determine the next check number. How should we execute this process?

Enter posting key 25 and save the transaction.

 

App: Manage Outgoing check

Through this application, the check number issued is matched with the payment document number; however, no clearing entry or similar posting is created.

We are manually entering checks through the FCH5 screen and processing the manual collection via the FCHR transaction code. According to the notes, these transaction codes are not available in the public cloud, and best practices in the public cloud do not provide a process guide for handling these steps. Could you provide support on how to manage outgoing check processes in the public cloud systems?
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance FIN (Finance)

entry.title: Re: WM staging 0 qty propesed
entry.content:

 I'd recommend you to review the Product Expert Training for 2302 in which I provided an overview including demo for the Advanced Production Integration. This might help to better understand some of the concepts. You can find the recording here, starting from minute 09:00.

Best regards,
Christian

entry.title: Re: How to connect to Database(On-Prem) via SAP Cloud Connector from SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hi @Rohit01 ,

Could you please share here the approach you followed to connect on prem sftp using jsch.
We have a similar requirement and trying to establishing connection using sock5proxy and jsch but recieving error as "Socket not connected".
